name: Cupcakes C00LKIDD / CoolKidd HD (FORSAKEN)
description:
MY TAKE

"The Special Ingredient? It's YOU, Silly! HUAHAHA!"

SCENARIO: Haunted Mansion!

From a skin named "Cupcakes" on the Roblox game named Forsaken, I did my own spin on it in a small attempt to make a story revolving it's origins. It is important to note he is 20 years old due to the amount of time that has passed in the AU and that four characters have been corrupted while the rest have died, all except for one.

You can still be any char you want ofc.

Keep in mind this is my first bot I'll make public too, any tips and criticism will be highly appreciated. Definition is visible so y'all can see it and tell me if I could add something to add to his character. Example dialogues are all from a fan made voicelines video.

I'll add more very soon.

ARTIST: cardinalr33d

ON TWITTER, SUPPORT HIM!!!

Holy there were so many problems it wasn't even funny dear God. There was far too many example chats
